- [ Contact ](/service/contact) - [ Shops ](/service/dealer-search) - [ Newsletter ](/service/newsletter) EN - [ DE ](https://www.menzerna.de/autopflege/autopolitur/produkte/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) - [ EN ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) [ ![image](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/logo.svg) ](/) [ ](/service/dealer-search) - [ Contact ](/service/contact) - [ Shops ](/service/dealer-search) - [ Newsletter ](/service/newsletter) EN - [ DE ](https://www.menzerna.de/autopflege/autopolitur/produkte/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) - [ Contact ](tel:+49722291570) - [ Shops ](/service/dealer-search) - [ ](#download) ![image](data:,) - [Homepage](/) - [Car care](/car-care) - [Car polish](/car-care/car-polish) - [Products](/car-care/car-polish/products) - Power Lock Ultimate Protection Back to the overview # Power Lock Ultimate Protection ## Polymer sealant for all automotive clear coats This specialist product with staying power not only offers a long-lasting seal, but also reliably protects against environmental influences. The polymer sealant boasts an unbeatable beading effect, not to mention peerless deep shine. Also suitable as a long-lasting coat sealant for new vehicles. *This product is intended exclusively for commercial/industrial use. It is not meant to be supplied to private end users.* Premium long-lasting sealant ### Processing - **Orbital: ** Low rotational speed range - **By hand: ** Light pressure with circular motions ### Volumes | 250ml | 22070.281.001 | 1l | 22070.261.001 ### Service life 6 months ### Steps **Step 1** Heavy Cut **Step 2** Medium Cut **Step 3** Finish **Step 4** Protection ### Optimised for [ ![image](data:,) Premium Microfiber Cloth ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/premium-microfiber-cloth) [ ![image](data:,) Hand Polishing Applicator ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/hand-polishing-applicator) [ ![image](data:,) Wax Foam Pad ](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/wax-foam-pad) [ ![image](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/_processed_/1/7/csm_menzerna_PLUP_1100x1100_5f77eeb674.png) ](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_Hintergrund/menzerna_PLUP_1100x1100.png) [ ![image](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/_processed_/5/5/csm_Autoversiegelung_Power_Lock_freigestellt_1100x1100_79a6cc6792.png) ](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Bilder/Autopolitur/Produktbilder/Produkt_freigestellt/Autoversiegelung_Power_Lock_freigestellt_1100x1100.png) ![image](/fileadmin/_processed_/1/7/csm_menzerna_PLUP_1100x1100_2bae3efd2a.png) ![image](/fileadmin/_processed_/5/5/csm_Autoversiegelung_Power_Lock_freigestellt_1100x1100_f35c0941ec.png) [ ](javascript:;) [Find this product at your local dealer](/service/dealer-search) [![image](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22070.261.001/rotation01.jpg)](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Products/22070.261.001/rotation01.jpg) ## More information - [Benefits](javascript:;) - [Recommended usage](javascript:;) - [Process Example](javascript:;) Benefits - Cutting-edge sealant technology - Exceptionally long service life - Maximum protection against environmental influences - Premium beading effect - Vehicle value retention Recommended usage - Clean the glossy surface with Menzerna Control Cleaner. - Shake the bottle before use and apply the sealant to the Wax Foam Pad. - Apply the sealant using an orbital polishing machine (and the cross-coating method). The product can also be applied by hand using the Hand Polishing Applicator or a microfiber cloth. - Exert light and even pressure while polishing and apply the product with a consistently low rotational speed. - Leave the sealant to dry for 25 to 30 minutes and remove any residual polish with the Premium microfiber cloth, without applying any pressure. Leave the sealant to harden in a protected area for at least 3 hours. - Optionally, you can reapply PLUP after 4 hours for a longer-lasting sealing effect. Process Example [ ![image](data:,) ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/heavy-cut-compound-400-green-line) [ ![image](data:,) ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/super-finish-3500) [ ![image](data:,) ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) ## Downloads - [ Technical datasheet Power Lock Ultimate Protection 122.32 KB ](/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Autopolituren/EN/TDB_15_Power_Lock_EN_09.2021.pdf) ## Related products [ ![image](data:,) Step 4 Sealing Wax Protection ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/sealing-wax-protection) [ ![image](data:,) Step 4 Liquid Carnauba Protection ](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/liquid-carnauba-protection) ![image](data:,) /fileadmin/user_upload/PLUP4.jpg Car sealant Power Lock

Thanks to polymer technology, Menzerna Power Lock offers long-lasting sealing and represents a genuine alternative to a ceramic coating. Power Lock boasts speedy and straightforward application and delivers long-lasting protection for car coats.

2021-11-10 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rlDx88eUy1M [ ](javascirpt:;) ##  By clicking on "Load video", I consent to the processing of my data by YouTube. This consent can be revoked at any time with effect for the future. Further information can be found in our [privacy policy](/data-privacy#hideCookiePopup). Load video FAQ ## Questions & answers Do you have a question? We have the answer. On our FAQ page you will find frequently asked questions with the corresponding answers. [To the FAQs](/car-care/training-tips/faqs) [What is the service life of Power Lock and how do I remove it?](javascript:;) [Power Lock](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) has a service life of approximately six months and can be removed with a Heavy Cut polish (e.g., [HCC400](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/heavy-cut-compound-400)) in combination with the [Heavy Cut Foam Pad](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/heavy-cut-foam-pad). [How do I use Menzerna Power Lock?](javascript:;) [Power Lock](/car-care/car-polish/products/details/power-lock-ultimate-protection) should be distributed evenly over the paint using the [Wax Foam Pad](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/wax-foam-pad) with a low rotational speed and low pressure. Continue polishing the surface until it’s transparent. Wait at least 20 to 30 minutes and then remove any excess polish with a microfiber cloth and allow to harden for several hours. Detailed instructions are available [here](https://www.menzerna.com/fileadmin/ns_theme_menzerna/Dokumente/Technische_Datenblaetter/Autopolituren/EN/TDB_15_Power_Lock_EN_09.2021.pdf). [What do beading and sheeting mean?](javascript:;) Beading refers to the surface’s ability to form beads, and can be achieved with car waxes and sealants. Sheeting is when a sealant is applied to a surface to make it water-repellent, with the effect that water immediately flows off of the car, taking any loose surface dirt with it. [What does a polishing training course with Menzerna products cost?](javascript:;) In Germany, a one-day Menzerna training course costs €249 per person, including Menzerna starter pack and food. Prices may vary in other countries. Please contact your certified Menzerna trainer directly for prices. Additional information [about polishing training courses is available here.](/car-care/training-tips/trainings) [What’s the difference between a wax and a sealant?](javascript:;) A polishing wax seals the surface with wax and is primarily made from naturally occurring components. Car wax has a maximum service life of three months. Sealant seals car paint with synthetically produced polymers and has a maximum service life of six months. Always up to date ## Register for the newsletter now! Subscribe now to the free Menzerna Newsletter and receive interesting tips and information about polishing. [To the newsletter](/service/newsletter) ## Car sealant Power Lock Thanks to polymer technology, Menzerna Power Lock offers long-lasting sealing and represents a genuine alternative to a ceramic coating. Power Lock boasts speedy and straightforward application and delivers long-lasting protection for car coats. ![image](/typo3conf/ext/pp_products/Resources/Public/images/loader-spinner.svg)
